name_cn:
Premium Grade Fendi Replica
💗 Small Monogram
The all-new FEND1 First is here!!
Designed under the direction of designer Kim Jones, this is the first Fend1, overturning previous bag shapes. The metal border large Logo lock combined with the body design combines architectural deconstruction with fashion, elegant yet cool, instantly eye-catching! Perfect for clutching at evening banquets, and also gives a high-end street chic feel when worn crossbody!
Small size 26x9.5x18cm
